title: SWAP IT UP !
subtitle: Solo dev challenge
intro: A guided project that I genuinely enjoyed building. It allowed me to combine structure, problem solving and creativity, everything I enjoy about coding.
development:
Despite its simple appearance, the game already involves several logical systems such as match detection, chain reactions and dynamic grid updates.

I first built the project in React.js before rewriting it entirely in TypeScript in order to turn it into a more serious and better structured project.

At the same time I started studying algorithms and their complexity more deeply in order to identify ways to optimize the game's logic.
hint: A "best hint" system analyzes the grid and determines the best immediate move. I also plan to improve the algorithm used to search for moves, notably by experimenting with a backtracking-based approach.
